---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like to see?**

A clear description of the feature you'd like added.

**Why?**

What problem does this solve? Is it blocking you from using this server, or is it a nice-to-have?

**Is it in the Firefly public API?**

If you're requesting a new Firefly endpoint, please link to the official Adobe docs. I only add things that are publicly documented and generally available.

Link: https://developer.adobe.com/firefly-services/docs/firefly-api/

**Would you be willing to contribute the implementation?**

- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR
- [ ] I could help test it
- [ ] I'm just suggesting — not able to help implement
